data.title: Kaldalón hf. approves financial statements for 2025 on 4 March 2026.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, the board of directors of Kaldalón hf. approved the annual accounts for the year 2025.

data.title: CPKC President & CEO Keith Creel to speak at J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on Mar 18, 8:05am ET.
data.description: The President and CEO of Canadian Pacific Kansas City (CPKC), Keith Creel, is set to speak at the J.P. Morgan 2026 Industrials Conference on March 18, 2026, at 8:05 a.m. ET. CPKC, listed on TSX and NYSE under CP, will offer live audio access to the event.

data.title: MicroCloud Hologram Inc. unveils Quantum Recurrent Neural Network (QRNN) tech for sequential learning, according to news article.
data.description: In Shenzhen, China on March 4, 2026, MicroCloud Hologram Inc. (NASDAQ: HOLO) introduced the Quantum Recurrent Neural Network (QRNN), designed for sequential learning tasks. This technology, developed by the technology service provider, is set to revolutionize the field of machine learning.

data.title: Siemens partners with Palo Alto Networks for AI-driven cybersecurity solution for Industrial 5G, ensuring enhanced protection.
data.description: Siemens has partnered with Palo Alto Networks to provide enhanced cybersecurity for Industrial 5G networks. The collaboration combines Siemens' private 5G infrastructure and continuous cybersecurity monitoring with Palo Alto Networks' AI-driven cybersecurity solution. Specifically designed for operational technology environments, this partnership offers increased security for industrial networks. The solution has been rigorously tested across various industrial deployment scenarios, ensuring its effectiveness. By leveraging these technologies, companies can now strengthen their defense against cyber threats in the Industrial 5G space.

data.title: MasterCraft partners with Yellow Sun Marine as exclusive dealer in Turks & Caicos; Wake to Wake Charter switches to all-MasterCraft fleet for customers.
data.description: Enthusiasts now have the opportunity to experience MasterCraft towboats in the top boating location in the Caribbean with official sales, servicing, and on-water demonstrations. This new option allows customers to explore the latest models first-hand while receiving trustworthy maintenance services. This development presents a unique chance to engage with top-of-the-line watercraft while enjoying the picturesque setting of the Caribbean.

data.title: Vishay's RGB LED in 0404 package offers separate control of red, green, blue, with 252 mcd at 5 mA, achieving full color range within CIE 1931 space.
data.description: A new compact device has been developed that can deliver a luminous intensity of 252 millicandelas at an operating current of 5 milliamperes. This device has the capability to display every color within the gamut triangle contained in the CIE 1931 color space.

data.title: Lotus Tech introduces LTS standard, launching LOTUS For Me, 1st X-hybrid model, in China in late March and Europe mid-2026.
data.description: Lotus Technology Inc. (Nasdaq: LOT), a prominent global luxury mobility provider, revealed the introduction of LTS (Lotus Tuned Specification), its exclusive engineering and dynamic-tuning standard. The company disclosed that LOTUS For Me, the initial X-hybrid model developed under LTS, will be released in China by late March, with plans for a European market launch commencing in mid-2026.

data.title: Gasoline prices surge with a 20-cent increase per gallon this week in the US. Diesel rates hit an all-time high, last seen in April 2024.
data.description: This week saw a significant increase in gas prices, with a gallon of regular gasoline spiking by over 20 cents. Additionally, diesel prices surged to their highest point since April 2024.

data.title: Two CFX projects in Florida receive ACEC 2026 Engineering Excellence Awards for capacity improvements with Flex Lanes technology.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in Orlando, two projects by the Central Florida Expressway Authority (CFX) utilizing Flex Lanes technology received recognition from the American Council of Engineering Companies of Florida (ACEC-FL) through the Florida Engineering Excellence Awards. This acknowledgment highlights the success and innovation of the CFX capacity improvements projects.

data.title: Kelsey H. Collins, PhD, wins 2026 NEXT Award for research on fat's role in osteoarthritis; $100k prize.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in New Orleans, Kelsey H. Collins, PhD, received the 2026 New Emerging eXperts in Translational Science (NEXT) Award for her study on the significance of fat tissue in osteoarthritis (OA) development. OA, traditionally seen as a result of aging and mechanical stress, was reevaluated by Collins, shedding light on how fat tissue plays a crucial part in the disease.

data.title: Quest Nutrition partners with Sophie Cunningham, debuts new products Stacks Protein Bar & Crispy Protein Chips in The Grand Try series.
data.description: In an event held in El Segundo, California on March 4, 2026, Cunningham led The Grand Try series featuring USA Rugby athletes and unveiled Quest's latest products - Stacks Bars and Crispy Protein Chips. Quest Nutrition collaborated with a professional basketball player for this initiative.

data.title: Jonathan Heckmann appointed as President of Texas market expansion for American Elevator Company, part of ESI family.
data.description: In Dallas on March 4, 2026, the American Elevator Company, a branch of Elevator Service, Inc. (ESI), disclosed the selection of Jonathan Heckmann, MBA, as the President to spearhead their expansion into the Texas market. This move aligns with the company's growth strategy and aims to capitalize on the opportunities in the region.
